description: Connect your mobile device to listen to audiobooks on the go.

happyAudio.title: Happy Audio
happyAudio.description: A premium audiobook player app for iOS and Android
happyAudio.about: Happy Audio is a beautifully designed audiobook player created by the same developer as Bookmark. It supports multiple audiobook servers and local files, giving you flexibility in how you manage your library.

connect.title: Connect Your Device
connect.description: Select your platform to see instructions for connecting your audiobook app to your Bookmark server.

step1.title: Install Bookmark
step1.description: Install the Bookmark app on your Android device.

step2.title: Generate QR Code
step2.description: Click the button below to generate a secure connection QR code.

step3.title: Scan or tap to open
step3.description: Scan the QR code with your phone's camera, or open the link from your device — Bookmark will launch with your server and key pre-filled.

step1.title: Open Bookmark
step1.description: Launch the Bookmark app on your Android device.

step2.title: Generate API Key
step2.description: Go to Preferences in this web app and generate an API key. Copy the key for the next step.

step3.title: Enter server URL
step3.description: On Bookmark's setup screen, paste the server URL shown below.

step4.title: Enter API key
step4.description: Paste the API key you generated.

step5.title: Connect
step5.description: Tap Connect to verify the credentials and finish setup.

limitReached.title: API key limit reached
limitReached.description: You've reached the maximum of {max} API keys. Remove an unused key in Preferences before generating a new connection.

android.keyLimitError: API key limit reached. Remove an unused key in Preferences first.
android.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with your Android phone's camera
android.scanNote: Make sure Bookmark is installed. When you scan the code, the app will open with your server and key pre-filled — tap Connect inside the app to finish.
android.openInAppNote: Already on your phone? Tap the button above to open Bookmark with your details pre-filled.

step1.title: Download Happy Audio
step1.description: Get Happy Audio from the App Store on your iPhone or iPad.

step2.title: Generate QR Code
step2.description: Click the button below to generate a secure connection QR code.

step3.title: Scan with Camera
step3.description: Open the Camera app on your iOS device and point it at the QR code to connect.

step1.title: Open Happy Audio
step1.description: Launch the Happy Audio app on your iPhone or iPad.

step2.title: Go to Settings
step2.description: Tap on Settings in the app.

step3.title: Connect to Bookmark
step3.description: Under Server Connections, tap Connect for Bookmark. Enter the server details shown below.

step4.title: Generate API Key
step4.description: Go to Preferences in Bookmark and generate an API key. Copy the key and paste it into the Happy Audio form.

step5.title: Test and Save
step5.description: Tap Test to verify the connection works, then tap Save to complete the setup.

limitReached.title: API key limit reached
limitReached.description: You've reached the maximum of {max} API keys. Remove an unused key in Preferences before generating a new connection.

ios.keyLimitError: API key limit reached. Remove an unused key in Preferences first.
ios.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with your iPhone camera
ios.scanNote: Make sure Happy Audio is installed. When you scan the code, it will open the app and automatically connect to your Bookmark server.
ios.openInAppNote: Already on your phone? Tap the button above to connect directly.
